title: Coinbase AI draws backlash after pushing World Cup result before kickoff
summary: CEO Brian Armstrong investigated, and the firm said it made updates to prevent future AI-generated inaccuracies.

title: FOMC minutes, SpaceX joins Nasdaq 100: Crypto Week Ahead
summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting July 6.

title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum is preparing its 'biggest rebuild' since the Merge
summary: A revised roadmap details how the multi-year overhaul would replace nearly every major part of Ethereum's protocol, with quantum resistance and privacy moving up the priority list. It lands as ether rallies more than 12% in the past seven days.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin pops to $63,900, then reverses, as week begins
summary: Bitcoin touched $63,882 overnight before retreating to around $62,900, per CoinDesk data. Sunday's high held briefly before sellers pushed it back down.

title: I am contemplating selling some of my bitcoin for gold, veteran trader Peter Brandt says
summary: Veteran trader Peter Brandt said gold is going to gain substantially on bitcoin.
